title: Diplodium brevichilum
taxonomy: Diplodium brevichilum is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant is classified within the family Orchidaceae and the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further classification places it within the tribe Diurideae and the genus Diplodium. The species is often found in the southern regions of Australia, particularly in the states of New South Wales and Victoria. It is typically found growing in woodland and grassland areas.
